Motion To Compel Admissions Or Deem Them Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Matthew Lakota's Motion To Compel Admissions Or Deem Them Admitted is ordered off calendar as there are no exhibits to the motion from which the court can determine whether the Requests For Admissions where properly signed or verified. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is ordered off calendar as the motion was brought without sufficient meet and confer. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
